title: Consolidate Cabinet into an app-independent system catalog
goal: Migrate Cabinet from mixed semantic, maintenance and runtime surfaces to one app-independent system catalog that owns stable ecosystem meaning, truth ownership, relations and entrypoints but no operational status.

acceptance.assertion: Exactly one maintained authority matrix identifies every source owner and non-authoritative projection.
Catalog data, validation and rendering work with the external Cabinet application stopped and are not shaped by Cabinet room manifests or runtime state.
The maintained catalog contains no duplicated task priority, runtime health, merge readiness, active execution or scheduler state.
A single registry-derived ecosystem view is canonical for generated mapping; other views are explicit specialized projections or retired.
Legacy rooms and duplicate prose are linked or archived without losing durable decisions.
CI detects competing ecosystem canons, manually duplicated authority fields and prohibited operational-status fields.

metadata.source_decision: Operator decision on 2026-07-10 to replace the external Cabinet-app foundation with an app-independent catalog.
